spaces.defaultCaregiverHint: New tasks for plants here start with this person, but anyone can take over.
spaces.placementNoteSitterHint: Shared with anyone who has an active sitter link.
spaces.namePlaceholder: e.g., Living room or Back patio
spaces.manageDescription: Create the rooms and outdoor areas where your plants live, with optional light, pet access, and rain exposure details.
spaces.moveDescription: Choose a new household space. Tasks will show the new location right away.
spaces.overviewDescription: A walkable view of what lives where and which spaces need attention.
spaces.taskFilterDescription: Task status, assignment, and completion still work as usual.

seasonalHomes.title: Seasonal homes
seasonalHomes.description: Choose where this plant usually lives in warm and cool seasons.
seasonalHomes.suggestionDescription: It is {{season}} in your hemisphere. Move this plant to {{space}}?
seasonalHomes.moveSuccess: Plant moved to its seasonal home
seasonalHomes.locationTitle: Add a location for seasonal reminders
seasonalHomes.locationDescription: Your household location tells us which season is current in your hemisphere.

placementFit.title: Placement check
placementFit.description: A gentle check for {{space}} based on the details you have added.
placementFit.lightCheck: {{space}} is marked as {{current}}, while this species usually needs at least {{recommended}}. Observe its growth before deciding whether to move it.
placementFit.petCheck: This species may be toxic if chewed, and {{space}} is marked as accessible to pets. Consider moving it out of reach.

sharedCarePulse.title: Make care something the household shares
sharedCarePulse.description: A quick check that reminders have become a routine another person can actually pick up.

plant.title: Add a plant
plant.description: Give the household something real to care for. You can add its schedule next.

task.title: Plan the care
task.description: Open a plant and add a recurring task so the right work appears at the right time.

teammate.title: Invite someone
teammate.description: Share an invite with someone you trust. Plant care still works perfectly well solo, too.

sharedCare.title: Share the handoff
sharedCare.description: When another member completes a task, everyone can see that the care handoff works.

commercialHold.headline: New registration and commercial activity are paused
commercialHold.message: Commercial activity, new account registration, and payment collection are paused. This remains a technical demonstration; new signups, paid plans, purchases, and plan changes are unavailable. Existing account holders can still sign in.

auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

plants.title: Plants
plants.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

nameNursery.title: The name nursery
nameNursery.description: Choose the vibe. We’ll handle the paperwork.

archive.dialogDescription: Archive it to keep every task, photo, and care note without receiving reminders. You can restore it whenever you’re ready.
archive.tasksPausedDescription: Restore this plant to resume reminders or change its care tasks.
archive.emptyDescription: Archived, given-away, and memorial plants will stay here with their care history intact.

propagate.bannerHint: The new plant will be linked to its parent.

share.title: Share this cutting
share.description: Anyone with this link can see the plant card and add a copy to their own greenhouse. The link works for 14 days.
share.copyFailed: Could not copy — select the link and copy it manually.

leafHealth.title: Leaf health check
leafHealth.description: Take a close-up photo of a leaf and we’ll look for visible signs of stress — yellowing, browning edges, wilting, spots, or pests.
leafHealth.noObservations: No visible signs of trouble on this leaf.
leafHealth.demoNotice: Demo result — image analysis is not configured on this server.
leafHealth.notAnImage: That file is not an image — pick a photo of the leaf.
leafHealth.tooLarge: That photo is too large even after resizing — try a closer crop of the leaf.
leafHealth.readFailed: Could not read that photo. Try again or pick a different one.

shared.title: A cutting for you
shared.provenance: Grown by {{name}}, passed on to you.
shared.invalid: This share link is invalid or has expired.
shared.askForNew: Ask the sender for a fresh link — they expire after 14 days.
shared.graftBody: Grow your own cutting from {{name}} and keep its story going in your greenhouse.
shared.needHousehold: Create or join a household first to grow this cutting.
shared.metaDescription: A cutting of {{name}}, shared by {{household}}. Grow your own and keep its story going on Family Greenhouse.

importPlants.title: Import plants
importPlants.description: Bring an existing collection over in one go. Upload a CSV or JSON file — including exports from this app.
importPlants.dropHint: Drag and drop a .csv or .json file here
importPlants.formatHelp: CSV needs a header row with at least a "name" column (species, location, notes, tags, and per-plant tasks are optional). JSON accepts a list of plants or a Family Greenhouse export file.

errors.unsupportedType: That file type is not supported — use a .csv or .json file.
errors.readFailed: Could not read that file. Try again or pick a different file.
errors.invalidJson: That JSON file could not be parsed.
errors.unrecognizedJson: Unrecognized JSON shape — expected a list of plants, {"plants": [...]}, or a Family Greenhouse export.
errors.missingNameColumn: The CSV header row needs a "name" column.
errors.emptyFile: No plant rows found in that file.

preview.title: Preview
preview.invalidRowsSkipped: Rows with errors are skipped — fix them in the file and re-upload.

results.title: Import complete
results.planLimit: You reached your current demo plan’s plant limit, so the remaining rows were skipped. Plan changes are paused.

vacation.noCoverOptions: Add another member to hand off care.
vacation.description: Their reminders go to the covering member until the window ends.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage notifications and view your household plan status.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Customize how the app looks and feels.

apiKeys.writeScopeWarning: This key will be able to complete and snooze tasks in your household. Only grant write access to integrations you trust.

billing.nativeUnavailable: Plan changes aren't available in the app.
billing.overLimitBody: Your household has more plants or members than your current plan includes. Everything you have keeps working — you can still view, edit, and remove — but adding new plants or members is paused until you are back under the limit.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.deviceActive: Push notifications are enabled on this device.
notifications.deviceInactive: Enable push reminders on this device.
notifications.weeklyDigestDescription: One email a week listing the plants most at risk, ranked by the most overdue care.
notifications.weeklyDigestRequiresEmail: Turn on email notifications to receive the weekly digest.
notifications.phoneCodeSent: Code sent! Enter the 6-digit code we texted you.
notifications.phoneVerifySuccess: Phone number verified. You can now enable SMS reminders.
notifications.phoneUnverifiedHint: Verify your phone number to enable SMS reminders.
notifications.smsUnavailable: SMS delivery is not enabled right now. Email and browser reminders still work; phone verification will return when delivery is available.

mobile.accountPrompt: Need to manage or delete this account?
mobile.planAvailableBody: Signing in gives you access to the plants, tasks, household sharing, and care features included with your existing account. No payment is collected in this app.
